summary: Verified WhatsApp message template formatting fix. The fix correctly handles None phone values and removes '+None' patterns from rendered messages. All 7 backend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix verified: get_company_short_name() now uses 'or' operator (line 247) to handle None phone values
Fix verified: render_wa_template() has cleanup logic (lines 289-291) to strip '+None' patterns
Backend logs confirm: BEFORE fix (17:42:14) had '+None', AFTER fix (17:44:04) does not
WhatsApp logs API confirms most recent order message ends with '*TESTCO*' without '+None'
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp template fix verified. The fix in utils/templates.py correctly handles None phone values. Key evidence: 1) Backend HTTP logs show message at 17:42:14 had '+None' (before fix), message at 17:44:04 does not (after fix). 2) WhatsApp logs API shows most recent order_confirmed message ends with '*TESTCO*' without '+None'. 3) Code review confirms fix: get_company_short_name uses 'or' operator for None handling, render_wa_template has cleanup logic for '+None' patterns.

features_tested.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Returns access_token and user object
features_tested.GET /api/orders: PASS - Returns list of orders (plain array)
features_tested.PUT /api/orders/{id}/status: PASS - Updates status and triggers WhatsApp notification
features_tested.GET /api/whatsapp-logs: PASS - Most recent order message does NOT contain '+None'

fix_verification.bug_description: WhatsApp notifications were sending with '+None' for missing phone values
fix_details: Line 247: phone = company.get('phone') or '' - handles None with 'or' operator
Line 280: kwargs.setdefault('company_phone', phone or '') - double protection

+None', '
+
', and trailing '
